GetById(int id)\n    {\n        return Vjezba.Model.Main.Cinemas\n            .SelectMany(c =\u003e c.Halls)\n            .SelectMany(h =\u003e h.Screenings)\n            .Where(s =\u003e s.Movie is not null)\n            .Select(s =\u003e s.Movie!)\n            .FirstOrDefault(m =\u003e m.Id == id);\n    }\n}\n"

                       "content":  "using Vjezba.Model.Data;\nusing Vjezba.Model.Models.Entities;\n\nnamespace Vjezba.Model;\n\npublic static class Main\n{\n    public static void initialOutput()\n    {\n        var cinemaRepository = new CinemaMockRepository();\n        var hallRepository = new HallMockRepository();\n        var screeningRepository = new ScreeningMockRepository();\n        var customerRepository = new CustomerMockRepository();\n        var ticketRepository = new TicketMockRepository();\n\n        var cinemas = cinemaRepository.GetAll();\n        var halls = hallRepository.GetAll();\n        var screenings = screeningRepository.GetAll();\n        var customers = customerRepository.GetAll();\n        var tickets = ticketRepository.GetAll();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"=== Kina ===\");\n        foreach (var cinema in cinemas)\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Kino: {cinema.Name} ({cinema.City})\");\n        }\n\n        Console.WriteLine();\n        Console.WriteLine(\"=== Dvorane ===\");\n        foreach (var hall in halls)\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Dvorana: {hall.Name} | Kapacitet: {hall.Capacity} | 3D: {(hall.Supports3D ? \"DA\" : \"NE\")}\");\n        }\n\n        Console.WriteLine();\n        Console.WriteLine(\"=== Projekcije ===\");\n        foreach (var screening in screenings)\n        {\n            var movieTitle = screening.Movie?.Title ?? \"Nepoznat film\";\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Projekcija: {movieTitle} | {screening.StartTime:dd.MM.yyyy HH:mm} | 3D: {(screening.Is3D ? \"DA\" : \"NE\")}\");\n        }\n\n        Console.WriteLine();\n        Console.WriteLine(\"=== Kupci i ulaznice ===\");\n        foreach (var customer in customers)\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Kupac: {customer.FirstName} {customer.LastName} | Loyalty: {(customer.IsLoyaltyMember ? \"DA\" : \"NE\")} | Bodovi: {customer.LoyaltyPoints}\");\n        }\n\n        Console.WriteLine();\n        foreach (var ticket in tickets)\n        {\n            var movieTitle = ticket.Screening?.Movie?.Title ?? \"Nepoznat film\";\n            var customerName = ticket.Customer is null\n                ? \"Nepoznat kupac\"\n                : $\"{ticket.Customer.FirstName} {ticket.Customer.LastName}\";\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Ulaznica {ticket.TicketNumber} | Film: {movieTitle} | Kupac: {customerName} | Cijena: {ticket.Price} EUR | Status: {ticket.Status}\");\n        }\n\n        Console.WriteLine();\n        Console.WriteLine(\"=== Jednostavni LINQ upiti ===\");\n\n        var cinemasWith3DHall = halls\n            .Where(h =\u003e h.Supports3D)\n            .Select(h =\u003e h.Name)\n            .Distinct();\n\n        var maxTicketPrice = 8.00m;\n        var ticketsBelowPrice = tickets\n            .Where(t =\u003e t.Price \u003c maxTicketPrice)\n            .Select(t =\u003e $\"{t.TicketNumber} ({t.Price} EUR)\");\n\n        var longGenreMovies = screenings\n            .Where(s =\u003e s.Movie is not null\n                \u0026\u0026 s.Movie.DurationMinutes \u003e 120\n                \u0026\u0026 (s.Movie.Genre == MovieGenre.Action\n                    || s.Movie.Genre == MovieGenre.Horror\n                    || s.Movie.Genre == MovieGenre.Thriller))\n            .Select(s =\u003e s.Movie!)\n            .GroupBy(m =\u003e m.Id)\n            .Select(g =\u003e g.First())\n            .Select(m =\u003e $\"{m.Title} ({m.DurationMinutes} min, {m.Genre})\");\n\n        var screeningsAfter19 = screenings\n            .Where(s =\u003e s.StartTime.Hour \u003e= 19)\n            .Select(s =\u003e $\"{s.Movie?.Title} ({s.StartTime:dd.MM HH:mm})\");\n\n        var topLoyaltyCustomer = customers\n            .OrderByDescending(c =\u003e c.LoyaltyPoints)\n            .FirstOrDefault();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"Dvorane koje podrzavaju 3D:\");\n        foreach (var hallName in cinemasWith3DHall)\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"- {hallName}\");\n        }\n        Console.WriteLine();\n\n        Console.WriteLine($\"Ulaznice ispod cijene {maxTicketPrice} EUR:\");\n        foreach (var ticketInfo in ticketsBelowPrice)\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"- {ticketInfo}\");\n        }\n        Console.WriteLine();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"Filmovi duzi od 120 minuta (akcija, horor ili triler):\");\n        foreach (var movieInfo in longGenreMovies)\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"- {movieInfo}\");\n        }\n        Console.WriteLine();\n\n        Console.WriteLine(\"Projekcije koje pocinju nakon 19:00:\");\n        foreach (var screening in screeningsAfter19)\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"- {screening}\");\n        }\n        Console.WriteLine();\n\n        if (topLoyaltyCustomer != null)\n        {\n            Console.WriteLine($\"Kupac s najvise bodova: {topLoyaltyCustomer.FirstName} {topLoyaltyCustomer.LastName} ({topLoyaltyCustomer.LoyaltyPoints})\");\n        }\n\n        Console.WriteLine();\n    }\n}\n"

private readonly CinemaMockRepository _cinemaRepository;\n+    private readonly MovieMockRepository _movieRepository;\n+    private readonly ScreeningMockRepository _screeningRepository;\n+    private readonly SeatMockRepository _seatRepository;\n+    private readonly TicketMockRepository _ticketRepository;\n+\n+    public TicketBuilderController(\n+        CinemaMockRepository cinemaRepository,\n+        MovieMockRepository movieRepository,\n+        ScreeningMockRepository screeningRepository,\n+        SeatMockRepository seatRepository,\n+        TicketMockRepository ticketRepository)\n+    {\n+        _cinemaRepository = cinemaRepository;\n+        _movieRepository = movieRepository;\n+        _screeningRepository = screeningRepository;\n+        _seatRepository = seatRepository;\n+        _ticketRepository = ticketRepository;\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpGet]\n+    public IActionResult Index()\n+    {\n+        var model = new TicketBuilderCinemaListViewModel\n+        {\n+            Cinemas = _cinemaRepository.GetAll().OrderBy(c =\u003e c.Name).ToList()\n+        };\n+\n+        return View(model);\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpGet]\n+    public IActionResult Movies(int cinemaId)\n+    {\n+        var cinema = _cinemaRepository.GetById(cinemaId);\n+        if (cinema is null)\n+        {\n+            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n+        }\n+\n+        var screeningsInCinema = _screeningRepository.GetAll()\n+            .Where(s =\u003e s.Hall?.Cinema?.Id == cinemaId \u0026\u0026 s.Movie is not null)\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var movieIds = screeningsInCinema\n+            .Select(s =\u003e s.Movie!.Id)\n+            .Distinct()\n+            .ToHashSet();\n+\n+        var movies = _movieRepository.GetAll()\n+            .Where(m =\u003e movieIds.Contains(m.Id))\n+            .OrderBy(m =\u003e m.Title)\n+            .Select(m =\u003e new TicketBuilderMovieCardViewModel\n+            {\n+                Id = m.Id,\n+                Title = m.Title,\n+                Genre = m.Genre.ToString(),\n+                DurationMinutes = m.DurationMinutes,\n+                Language = m.Language,\n+                AgeRating = m.AgeRating\n+            })\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var model = new TicketBuilderMovieListViewModel\n+        {\n+            CinemaId = cinema.Id,\n+            CinemaName = cinema.Name,\n+            Movies = movies\n+        };\n+\n+        return View(model);\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpGet]\n+    public IActionResult Screenings(int cinemaId, int movieId)\n+    {\n+        var cinema = _cinemaRepository.GetById(cinemaId);\n+        var movie = _movieRepository.GetById(movieId);\n+        if (cinema is null || movie is null)\n+        {\n+            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n+        }\n+\n+        var screenings = _screeningRepository.GetAll()\n+            .Where(s =\u003e s.Hall?.Cinema?.Id == cinemaId \u0026\u0026 s.Movie?.Id == movieId)\n+            .OrderBy(s =\u003e s.StartTime)\n+            .Select(s =\u003e new TicketBuilderScreeningCardViewModel\n+            {\n+                Id = s.Id,\n+                HallId = s.Hall?.Id ?? 0,\n+                HallName = s.Hall?.Name ?? \"Nepoznata dvorana\",\n+                StartTime = s.StartTime,\n+                EndTime = s.EndTime,\n+                Is3D = s.Is3D\n+            })\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var model = new TicketBuilderScreeningListViewModel\n+        {\n+            CinemaId = cinema.Id,\n+            CinemaName = cinema.Name,\n+            MovieId = movie.Id,\n+            MovieTitle = movie.Title,\n+            Screenings = screenings\n+        };\n+\n+        return View(model);\n+    }\n+\n+    [HttpGet]\n+    public IActionResult Seats(int cinemaId, int movieId, int screeningId)\n+    {\n+        var cinema = _cinemaRepository.GetById(cinemaId);\n+        var movie = _movieRepository.GetById(movieId);\n+        var screening = _screeningRepository.GetById(screeningId);\n+\n+        if (cinema is null || movie is null || screening is null)\n+        {\n+            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Index));\n+        }\n+\n+        var hallId = screening.Hall?.Id;\n+        if (!hallId.HasValue)\n+        {\n+            return RedirectToAction(nameof(Screenings), new { cinemaId, movieId });\n+        }\n+\n+        var seats = _seatRepository.GetAll()\n+            .Where(s =\u003e s.Hall?.Id == hallId.Value)\n+            .OrderBy(s =\u003e s.RowLabel)\n+            .ThenBy(s =\u003e s.SeatNumber)\n+            .Select(s =\u003e new TicketBuilderSeatViewModel\n+            {\n+                Id = s.Id,\n+                RowLabel = s.RowLabel,\n+                SeatNumber = s.SeatNumber,\n+                SeatType = s.SeatType.ToString()\n+            })\n+            .ToList();\n+\n+        var takenSeatIds = _ticketRepository.GetAll()\n+            .Where(t =\u003e t.Screening?.Id == screeningId\n+                \u0026\u0026 t.Seat is not null\n+                \u0026\u0026 (t.Status == Models.Entities.TicketStatus.Active || t.Status == Models.Entities.TicketStatus.Used))\n+            .Select(t =\u003e t.Seat!.Id)\n+            .Distinct()\n+            .ToHashSet();\n+\n+        var seatStatuses = seats.ToDictionary(\n+            s =\u003e s.Id,\n+            s =\u003e takenSeatIds.Contains(s.Id) ? \"taken\" : \"available\");\n+\n+        var model = new TicketBuilderSeatPageViewModel\n+        {\n+            CinemaId = cinema.Id,\n+            CinemaName = cinema.Name,\n+            MovieId = movie.Id,\n+            MovieTitle = movie.Title,\n+            ScreeningId = screening.Id,\n+            HallName = screening.Hall?.Name ?? \"Nepoznata dvorana\",\n+            StartTime = screening.StartTime,\n+            EndTime = screening.EndTime,\n+            Is3D = screening.Is3D,\n+            Seats = seats,\n+            SeatStatuses = seatStatuses\n+        };\n+\n+        return View(model);\n+    }\n+}\n*** End Patch"

seatStatus\n                            : \"available\";\n                        var seatTypeLower = seat.SeatType.ToLowerInvariant();\n                        var seatTypeClass = seatTypeLower switch\n                        {\n                            \"vip\" =\u003e \"seat-vip\",\n                            \"couple\" =\u003e \"seat-couple\",\n                            _ =\u003e \"seat-standard\"\n                        };\n                        var statusClass = status == \"taken\" ? \"seat-taken\" : string.Empty;\n\n                        \u003cbutton type=\"button\"\n                                class=\"tb-seat @seatTypeClass @statusClass\"\n                                data-seat-id=\"@seat.Id\"\n                                data-seat-label=\"@seat.RowLabel@seat.SeatNumber\"\n                                data-seat-type=\"@seat.SeatType\"\n                                data-seat-status=\"@status\"\n                                data-is-3d=\"@(Model.Is3D ? \"1\" : \"0\")\"\u003e\n                            @seat.RowLabel@seat.SeatNumber\n                        \u003c/button\u003e\n                    }\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n            }\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n\n        \u003cdiv class=\"tb-legend\"\u003e\n            \u003cspan\u003e\u003ci class=\"tb-seat seat-standard\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e Standard\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan\u003e\u003ci class=\"tb-seat seat-vip\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e VIP\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan\u003e\u003ci class=\"tb-seat seat-couple\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e Couple\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cspan\u003e\u003ci class=\"tb-seat seat-taken\"\u003e\u003c/i\u003e Zauzeto\u003c/span\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n\n        \u003cdiv id=\"tb-price-panel\" class=\"tb-price-panel\"\u003e\n            Odaberi sjedalo za prikaz cijene.\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n\u003c/div\u003e\n\n@section Scripts {\n\u003cscript\u003e\n(() =\u003e {\n    const panel = document.getElementById(\"tb-price-panel\");\n    const seats = document.querySelectorAll(\".tb-seat[data-seat-id]\");\n\n    function calculatePrice(type, is3D) {\n        const normalized = (type || \"standard\").toLowerCase();\n        let basePrice = 7.50;\n\n        if (normalized === \"vip\") {\n            basePrice = 11.00;\n        } else if (normalized === \"couple\") {\n            basePrice = 13.50;\n        }\n\n        if (is3D) {\n            basePrice += 2.00;\n        }\n\n        return basePrice;\n    }\n\n    seats.forEach((seat) =\u003e {\n        seat.addEventListener(\"click\", () =\u003e {\n            const seatLabel = seat.dataset.seatLabel || \"\";\n            const seatType = seat.dataset.seatType || \"Standard\";\n            const seatStatus = seat.dataset.seatStatus || \"available\";\n            const is3D = seat.dataset.is3d === \"1\";\n\n            if (seatStatus === \"taken\") {\n                panel.textContent = `${seatLabel} je zauzeto. Odaberi drugo sjedalo.`;\n                return;\n            }\n\n            const price = calculatePrice(seatType, is3D).toFixed(2);\n            panel.textContent = `${seatLabel} | Tip: ${seatType} | Cijena: ${price} EUR`;\n        });\n    });\n})();\n\u003c/script\u003e\n}\n"
                   }
